scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@tcg-collector/api-types && npm run build --workspace=@tcg-collector/core && npm run build --workspace=@tcg-collector/vision
scripts.watch:packages: concurrently "npm run watch --workspace=@tcg-collector/api-types" "npm run watch --workspace=@tcg-collector/core" "npm run watch --workspace=@tcg-collector/vision"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run watch:packages" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run server:build" "npm run client:build"
